# Cost Dashboard Screenshots

This directory contains visual validation screenshots generated by Playwright E2E tests.

## Screenshot Manifest

### Generated by Tests

| Screenshot | Dimensions | Test | Purpose |
|------------|-----------|------|---------|
| `cost-dashboard-daily.png` | 1920x1080 | Full page | Complete dashboard UI |
| `cost-token-breakdown.png` | 1920x1080 | Token metrics | Cache token cards |
| `cost-trend-chart.png` | 1920x800 | Chart visualization | 7-day line chart |
| `cost-alert.png` | 1920x1080 | Alert state | High cost alert banner |
| `cost-comparison.png` | 1920x600 | Savings section | Before/after comparison |
| `cost-dashboard-mobile.png` | 375x667 | Mobile viewport | Responsive layout |

## Generating Screenshots

### Prerequisites
1. Start API server: `cd api-server && npm run dev`
2. Start frontend: `cd frontend && npm run dev`

### Run Tests
```bash
cd tests/cache-optimization
npx playwright test
```

### View Screenshots
Screenshots are automatically generated and saved to this directory when tests run.

## Visual Validation Checklist

### Desktop View
- [ ] All metrics display with proper formatting
- [ ] Chart renders smoothly with 7-day data
- [ ] Token counts formatted with commas
- [ ] Alert banner appears when threshold exceeded
- [ ] Savings calculation shows correct percentage
- [ ] Icons render correctly (Lucide React)

### Mobile View (375x667)
- [ ] Layout stacks vertically
- [ ] All content remains readable
- [ ] Chart maintains aspect ratio
- [ ] Touch-friendly spacing
- [ ] No horizontal scroll

### Error States
- [ ] Loading spinner displays
- [ ] Error message shows on API failure
- [ ] No white screen crashes

## Screenshot Comparison

Use these screenshots for:
- Visual regression testing
- Design review
- Documentation
- Bug reporting
- User acceptance testing

## Notes

- Screenshots captured with Playwright v1.56+
- All tests run in Chromium browser
- Device emulation for mobile screenshots
- Full page screenshots for desktop views
